title: MC Big Legacy
description: A mod for b1.7.3 that makes your minecraft world bigger than the observable universe by using java's BigInteger class for coordinates instead of 32 bit integers
body:
**THIS MOD REQUIRES JAVA 25!**

Please don't attempt to run this mod on a server currently its not supported but may be implemented later.

Currently entities, and rendering are a bit buggy.

**Disclaimer**
Due to various unpredictable bugs that happen very far out, visuals such as flashing colors or jittery gameplay can and likely will happen, viewer discretion advised

**Basic usage**
- As of McBig 1.1.0 we now use brigadier for commands. Do /help to view all commands
- Flight can be enabled by doing /fly. It works the same way as modern.
- Noclip can be enabled by doing /noclip.
- /tp which works very similar to how the modern tp command does

Some example commands:
```
/tp 12550000 130 0
```
```
/tp 999999999999999999 ~ ~
```


**What happens when you go far out**
Due to this project being expertimental its quite possible the game will become more laggy the further you go out. If the game freezes for longer than 20 or so seconds I recommend just killing your game instance.

The stripelands can be enabled by leaving the fix stripelands box unchecked on startup

**Compatibility**
This mod is very likely not going to work with other ornithe/fabric mods due to how invasive this mod already is.
Some simple mods may work but may lead to undefined behavior.
RetroAuth seems to work with no issues
